title: helianthemum nummularium subsp. ovatum
intro: Helianthemum nummularium subsp. ovatum, also known as Rockrose or Sunrose, is a subspecies of the Helianthemum nummularium plant, which is a type of flowering shrub belonging to the Cistaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum nummularium subsp. ovatum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it as a treatment.
